messages.content:
Those look great.

<task_update>
- update the app's Background to work as a composition of those assets.

REQUIREMENTS:
- add very gentle movement to the clouds (a short swing range left-to-right)
- make that movement react to mouse movement or phone/ipad motion
</task_update>

I'm locating the current background implementation and the app route that uses it, then I'll wire the new sky/cloud asset composition into the existing structure rather than inventing a parallel component.
